Accept payments with lomi. Secure hosted: Acceptez les paiements avec lomi. via une page de paiement securisee. Creez un compte et recuperez vos cles API.
Autocomplete Order After Payment: Finaliser automatiquement la commande apres paiement
Automatic subscription renewals are not: Automatic subscription renewals are not charged in WooCommerce with lomi. Recurring billing is handled by the lomi. subscription engine after the first payment.
Cancel order & restore cart: Annuler la commande et restaurer le panier
Checklist: enable PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED and: Checklist: enable PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED and REFUND_COMPLETED in the dashboard (WooCommerce cannot verify this automatically).
Checkout one subscription product per or: Checkout one subscription product per order when paying with lomi.
Copy the URL above into Dashboard → Webh: Copy the URL above into Dashboard → Webhooks.
Copy your secret API key and webhook sig: Copy your secret API key and webhook signing secret from Dashboard → Developers → API keys and Dashboard → Webhooks.
Could not copy — select the URL and pres: Could not copy — select the URL and press Ctrl+C (or Cmd+C).
Impossible de verifier le paiement avec lomi..
Currency mismatch while verifying paymen: La devise ne correspond pas lors de la verification du paiement avec lomi.. Veuillez contacter la boutique.
Disabled — check “Enable lomi.” below to: Disabled — check “Enable lomi.” below to show at checkout.
If checked, the customer email address w: Si cette option est cochee, l'adresse e-mail du client sera envoyee a lomi.
If checked, the customer full name will: Si cette option est cochee, le nom complet du client sera envoye a lomi.
If checked, the customer phone will be s: Si cette option est cochee, le telephone du client sera envoye a lomi.
If checked, the order billing address wi: Si cette option est cochee, l'adresse de facturation sera envoyee a lomi.
If checked, the Order ID will be sent to: Si cette option est cochee, l'ID de commande sera envoye a lomi.
If checked, the order shipping address w: Si cette option est cochee, l'adresse de livraison sera envoyee a lomi.
If checked, the product(s) purchased wil: Si cette option est cochee, les produits achetes seront envoyes a lomi.
If enabled, the order will be marked as: Si cette option est activee, la commande sera marquee comme terminee apres un paiement reussi.
If enabled, you will be able to send mor: Si cette option est activee, vous pourrez envoyer davantage d'informations sur la commande a lomi..
Invalid secret API key for %1$s mode. Co: Invalid secret API key for %1$s mode. Copy the key from Dashboard → Developers → API keys and ensure test mode matches your keys.%2$s
Link \"%s\" to a lomi recurring price in: Link "%s" to a lomi recurring price in the product editor before checkout.
lomi. API request failed before receivin: La requete API lomi. a echoue avant de recevoir une reponse: %s
lomi. checkout session expired before pa: La session de paiement lomi. a expire avant le paiement; verifiez ou annulez la commande.
lomi. could not find this resource. Conf: lomi. could not find this resource. Confirm test/live mode matches the keys in your dashboard.%s
lomi. credentials are saved but the gate: lomi. credentials are saved but the gateway is disabled. Enable lomi. %shere%s for checkout.
lomi. is enabled but no webhook signing: lomi. is enabled but no webhook signing secret is configured. Add one %shere%s and register the webhook URL in your lomi. dashboard.
lomi. recommends HTTPS for production ch: lomi. recommends HTTPS for production checkout and webhooks. Your site is not served over SSL.
lomi. refund completed (refund %s). Init: lomi. refund completed (refund %s). Initiated outside WooCommerce if no matching Woo refund exists.
lomi. refund completed. Initiated outsid: lomi. refund completed. Initiated outside WooCommerce if no matching Woo refund exists.
lomi. requires WooCommerce to be install: lomi. necessite que WooCommerce soit installe et actif. Cliquez sur %s pour installer WooCommerce.
lomi. returned an error (%1$d): %2$s.%3$: lomi. returned an error (%1$d): %2$s.%3$s See the WooCommerce setup guide on docs.lomi.africa.
lomi. supports XOF, USD, and EUR only. S: lomi. prend uniquement en charge XOF, USD et EUR. Definissez la devise de votre boutique ici.
lomi. test mode is currently enabled. Re: Le mode test lomi. est actuellement active. Pensez a le desactiver lorsque vous voulez accepter des paiements reels sur votre site.
lomi.: amount mismatch (order expects %1: lomi.: montant different (la commande attend %1$s; la session contient %2$s).
lomi.: catalog checkout currency (%1$s): lomi.: catalog checkout currency (%1$s) differs from store currency (%2$s); verified against lomi catalog price.
lomi.: checkout session belongs to a dif: lomi.: checkout session belongs to a different order (session order %1$s vs current order %2$s). Possible replay attempt.
lomi.: checkout session expired before p: lomi.: checkout session expired before payment was confirmed.
lomi.: checkout session response missing: lomi.: la reponse de session de paiement ne contient pas checkout_session_id ou checkout_url.
lomi.: could not fetch checkout session: lomi.: impossible de recuperer la session de paiement depuis l'API apres le retour du client.
lomi.: customer left hosted checkout bef: lomi.: customer left hosted checkout before completing payment.
lomi.: failed to create checkout session: lomi.: echec de creation de la session de paiement (%s)
lomi.: payment confirmation pending — aw: lomi.: payment confirmation pending — awaiting webhook or a later session check.
lomi.: PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED webhook receive: lomi.: webhook PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED recu, mais la session n'a pas pu etre recuperee depuis l'API.
lomi.: return URL missing checkout sessi: lomi.: l'URL de retour ne contient pas l'ID de session de paiement dans les metadonnees de commande.
lomi.: session not paid yet (status: %1$: lomi.: session pas encore payee (statut: %1$s, session: %2$s).
lomi.: subscription line amount mismatch: lomi.: subscription line amount mismatch (expected %1$s; session has %2$s). Align Woo subscription price with the lomi recurring price.
Missing — add your test or live secret k: Missing — add your test or live secret key below.
Missing lomi. session. Please try again: Session lomi. manquante. Veuillez reessayer ou contacter la boutique.
Must be enabled for lomi. to appear at c: Must be enabled for lomi. to appear at checkout (in addition to the Active toggle on the Payments list).
Must be XOF, USD, or EUR.
Not detected — use HTTPS in production.
Open lomi. dashboard to copy price IDs f: Open lomi. dashboard to copy price IDs from your catalog.
Optional extra text below the payment me: Optional extra text below the payment method. Leave empty to use the default lomi. branding card.
Optional labels shown to customers at ch: Optional labels shown to customers at checkout.
Optional settings — most stores can leav: Optional settings — most stores can leave these hidden.
Optional. Not required for hosted checko: Facultatif. Non requis pour la page de paiement hebergee.
Order Billing Address: Adresse de facturation de la commande
Order Shipping Address: Adresse de livraison de la commande
Payment verification failed. Please try: Payment verification failed. Please try again or contact the store.
Payment was cancelled. Your cart has bee: Payment was cancelled. Your cart has been restored — you can place your order again.
Place a <a href=\"%s\" target=\"_blank\": Place a test order on your store while test mode is on.
Please enter your lomi. secret API key %: Veuillez saisir votre cle API secrete lomi. %sici%s pour utiliser cette passerelle.
Recommended — required to verify PAYMENT: Recommended — required to verify PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED webhooks.
Recurring lomi. price UUID for this vari: Recurring lomi. price UUID for this variation.
Refund amount must be greater than zero.

Remove the cancel order & restore cart b: Retirer le bouton Annuler la commande et restaurer le panier sur la page de paiement de commande
Renewal billing is handled by the lomi. subscription engine — not charged automatically in WooCommerce. Manage renewals in the lomi. customer portal or dashboard.
Sandbox API keys are in use. Disable tes: Sandbox API keys are in use. Disable test mode %swhen you go live%s.
Saved card payments are not available wi: Les paiements par carte enregistree ne sont pas disponibles avec lomi.
Secret for verifying webhook signatures: Secret pour verifier les signatures webhook (production).
Secret pour verifier les signatures webhook (test). Il doit correspondre au secret configure sur votre endpoint webhook lomi.
Setup guide: <a href=\"%1$s\" target=\"_: Setup guide: WooCommerce docs. Payouts and balance stay in the lomi. dashboard.
Split subscription and one-time products: Split subscription and one-time products into separate orders when paying with lomi.
Thank you for your order. Pay securely w: Merci pour votre commande. Payez en toute securite avec lomi. en utilisant le bouton ci-dessous.
This API key cannot perform this action. Check key permissions in the lomi. dashboard.%s
This controls the payment method title w: Controle le titre de la methode de paiement affiche au client lors du paiement.
This payment is not linked to a lomi tra: This payment is not linked to a lomi transaction. Process the refund from your lomi. dashboard.
Title: Titre
Unexpected response from lomi. when crea: Reponse inattendue de lomi. lors de la creation de la session de paiement.
Use the same signing secret as below. En: Use the same signing secret as below. Enable PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED and REFUND_COMPLETED in your lomi. dashboard.
UUID of the lomi. catalog product. Optio: UUID of the lomi. catalog product. Optional if the price ID is set — lomi. can derive the product from the price.
UUID of the recurring price in your lomi: UUID of the recurring price in your lomi. catalog. Required for WooCommerce Subscriptions checkout.
We could not confirm the payment amount: Nous n'avons pas pu confirmer le montant du paiement avec lomi.. Veuillez contacter la boutique.
When enabled, uses the sandbox API and t: When enabled, uses the sandbox API and test credentials below. Turn off only when you are ready for live payments.
WooCommerce free trial completed locally: WooCommerce free trial completed locally ($0). No lomi checkout or lomi subscription was created — recurring billing after the trial requires a paid lomi checkout or lomi catalog trial configuration.
Passerelle de paiement WooCommerce pour lomi.
WooCommerce Subscriptions: map each subs: WooCommerce Subscriptions: map each subscription product to a lomi recurring price in the product editor. Recurring billing is handled by lomi.; WooCommerce does not auto-charge renewals.
You can only add a new card when placing: Vous ne pouvez ajouter une nouvelle carte que lors du passage d'une commande.
Your lomi. payment was not completed. Yo: Votre paiement lomi. n'a pas ete finalise. Vous pouvez reessayer depuis la page de paiement de la commande.
Your payment is being confirmed. You wil: Your payment is being confirmed. You will receive an order update shortly.
